Description: A squat figure sits behind a makeshift counter of mushroom-wood, wares spread before him on fungal cloth. As you approach, you see it is a dwarf — but mushrooms sprout from his shoulders and neck, their caps pulsing faintly. He speaks in two voices at once: his own, and something deeper.

Replies.SsText: The merchant grins with too many teeth. His wares are surprisingly good — salvaged gear and rare fungi, offered at prices that seem almost generous. Perhaps the Mycelium wants you well-equipped for what lies ahead.

Replies.ReplyText: Try to free the dwarf from the fungal infection.
Replies.SsText: With combined effort, you manage to pry the fungal growths from the dwarf's body. He gasps, suddenly speaking in only one voice, and presses a reward into your hands with trembling fingers.
Replies.FlText: Your attempt to remove the fungus triggers a violent reaction. The dwarf's eyes go dark as the Mycelium takes full control, and he lunges at you with inhuman strength.

Replies.SsText: You back away slowly. Some things are better left alone in these depths. The merchant watches you go, both voices humming the same sad tune.
